zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wentworth於1476年7月22日出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Sir Henry Wentworth44歲，母親Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer23歲。她於大約1504年與Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年9月22日在英國艾可馬爾頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wentworth于1476年7月22日出生在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，她的父亲Sir Henry Wentworth44岁，母亲Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer23岁。她于大约1504年与Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年9月22日在英国艾可馬爾頓享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wentworth was born on 22 July 1476, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Henry Wentworth, was 44 and her mother, Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer, was 23. She married Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III about 1504, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 September 1545, in Maldon, Essex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wentworth est née le 22 juillet 1476, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Wentworth, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III environ 1504, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1545, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wentworth am 22. Juli 1476 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Wentworth 44 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer 23. Sie hat um 1504 in Essex, England Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. September 1545 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Maldon, Essex, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wentworth è nata il il 22 luglio 1476 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Wentworth, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III circa 1504, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1545, nel Maldon, Essex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wentworthが1476年7月22日にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Wentworthは44歳，母Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencerは23歳であった。約1504年にイギリスエセックスでLord Robert Darcy van Little Malden IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年9月22日にイギリスエセックスマルドンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wentworth(이)가 1476년 7월 22일 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Wentworth(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1504년 영국 에세스에서 Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 9월 22일 영국 에세스 맬던에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.22 July 1476–22 September 1545: 22 de julho de 1476–22 de setembro de 1545
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wentworth nasceu em 22 de julho de 1476, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Wentworth, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III aproximadamente 1504, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1545, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wentworth родилась 22 июля 1476 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Wentworth было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III около 1504 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 сентября 1545 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.22 July 1476–22 September 1545: 22 de julio de 1476–22 de septiembre de 1545
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Wentworth nació el 22 de julio de 1476, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Wentworth, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Wentworth Say, Baroness Despencer, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III aproximadamente 1504, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1545, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
